concerns.text: No task explicitly creates data-model.md (Phase 1 output per plan.md). Plan lists data-model.md as required artifact with entity definitions (AR Event, Gravity Anomaly, Correlation Result), but tasks only reference entities without creating the document.

Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires dataset URLs to be verified before Phase 0. Tasks T011/T012 specify fetching from 'CSR/JPL official repository' and NOAA URL but lack explicit URL verification task. Analyze report flagged this as MEDIUM severity.

Task T010 references 'Einstein review concern' which is not present in current spec.md or plan.md. This appears to be a stale tag from an older spec version. Should be updated to reference current spec language (e.g., 'gravity anomaly frame of reference per Assumptions section').

SC-004 runtime measurement (≤6h) is only measured in T052 after completion. Plan.md notes runtime measurement should be 'All phases' but T052 is post-completion only, preventing phase-level runtime validation as required by SC-004.
